## NotifyReportRequest

**Type**: OCPP 2.0.1 Message Schema (Request)
**Base Message**: NotifyReport

### Properties

CustomDataType: No
integer: Yes
string(date-time): Yes
array<ReportDataType>: No
boolean: No
integer: Yes

          "maxLength": 255

      ]

    "AttributeEnumType": {
      "description": "Attribute: Actual, MinSet, MaxSet, etc.\r\nDefaults to Actual if absent.\r\n",
      "javaType": "AttributeEnum",

"type": "string",

        "Target",
        "MinSet",
        "MaxSet"
      ]
    },
    "DataEnumType": {
      "description": "Data type of this variable.\r\n",

      "type": "string",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "enum": [
        "string",
        "decimal",
        "integer",
        "dateTime",
        "boolean",
        "OptionList",
        "SequenceList",
        "MemberList"
      ]
    },
    "MutabilityEnumType": {
      "description": "Defines the mutability of this attribute. Default is ReadWrite when omitted.\r\n",
      "javaType": "MutabilityEnum",
      "type": "string",
      "default": "ReadWrite",

        "ReadOnly",
        "WriteOnly",
        "ReadWrite"
      ]

          "maxLength": 50
        },
        "instance": {
          "description": "Name of instance in case the component exists as multiple instances. Case Insensitive. strongly advised to use Camel Case.\r\n",
